title: SquadScope Image Registry
description: Registry of locally-hosted cover images with license and attribution tracking.

filename.description: Relative path from repo root (e.g., assets/covers/2026-W24.webp)

source_url.description: Original source URL where the image was obtained

license.description: License under which the image is used

added_by.description: Who added this image (person or automation identifier)

added_at.description: ISO date when the image was added

used_in.description: List of content paths using this image (e.g., content/weekly/2026/W24.md)
